354.issue_title: Add get_pr tool: narrow GitHub pulls API wrapper for end-issue flow

deliverables.description: mcp_server/state/github_read_models.py created with PRReadModel (8 fields, frozen)
GitHubAdapter.get_pr(pr_number: int) -> PullRequest added
GitHubManager.get_pr(pr_number: int) -> PRReadModel added
GetPRTool added to mcp_server/tools/pr_tools.py
GetPRTool registered in mcp_server/server.py inside github_token block
MergePRTool.execute() uses manager.get_pr() — zero self.manager.adapter references
test_merge_pr_tool replaced: uses PRReadModel fixture, no adapter.repo.get_pull mock
test_get_pr_tool added
tests/mcp_server/unit/test_server.py — assert GetPRTool registered when token present; assert NOT registered when token absent

cycles.exit_criteria: GetPRTool registered and returns JSON text; MergePRTool.execute() has zero self.manager.adapter references; test_merge_pr_tool uses PRReadModel fixture with no legacy adapter mock; PRReadModel frozen; quality gates pass.
cycles.goal: Add PRReadModel frozen DTO, GitHubAdapter.get_pr(), GitHubManager.get_pr() -> PRReadModel, GetPRTool, server registration, and fix MergePRTool.execute() to call manager.get_pr() instead of manager.adapter.repo.get_pull(). Zero breaking changes to existing tool contracts.
cycles.name: C1: get_pr stack + MergePRTool Demeter fix

deliverables.description: github_read_models.py extended with MilestoneReadModel + IssueReadModel (12 fields, both frozen)
GitHubManager.get_issue() return type changed from Issue to IssueReadModel; normalization logic added
GetIssueTool.execute() returns ToolResult.text(json.dumps(model.model_dump(), indent=2)); zero host-object field access
test_get_issue (manager) replaced: normalization test asserting all 12 IssueReadModel fields
test_get_issue_tool replaced: mocks manager.get_issue() -> IssueReadModel; asserts JSON text output

cycles.exit_criteria: GetIssueTool.execute() has zero PyGithub host-object field access; GitHubManager.get_issue() returns IssueReadModel; JSON output matches IssueReadModel.model_dump() (12 fields, flat, no 'success' wrapper); IssueReadModel + MilestoneReadModel frozen; test_get_issue_tool asserts JSON text output; quality gates pass.
cycles.goal: Extend github_read_models.py with IssueReadModel (12 fields) + MilestoneReadModel. Refactor GitHubManager.get_issue() to normalize Issue -> IssueReadModel. Refactor GetIssueTool.execute() to return flat JSON text. Replace all tests that mock raw Issue host objects.
cycles.name: C2: get_issue clean break to IssueReadModel

deliverables.description: docs/reference/mcp/tools/github.md get_issue section rewritten to flat IssueReadModel JSON (no 'success' wrapper)
docs/reference/mcp/tools/github.md has new get_pr section with all 8 PRReadModel fields
end-issue.prompt.md: get_pr() called after merge_pr and before git_checkout (design §3.8)
end-issue.prompt.md: compares head_branch from get_pr with active branch from get_work_context; stops on mismatch
end-issue.prompt.md: git_checkout uses base_branch from get_pr() result
start-issue.prompt.md: step 1 references JSON fields 'title' and 'labels' explicitly

cycles.exit_criteria: github.md get_issue example has no 'success' key; github.md has get_pr section with all 8 PRReadModel fields; end-issue calls get_pr() after merge_pr and before git_checkout per design §3.8; end-issue compares head_branch with active branch and stops on mismatch; end-issue uses base_branch from get_pr for git_checkout; start-issue step 1 references 'title' and 'labels' as JSON fields.
cycles.goal: Rewrite docs/reference/mcp/tools/github.md (flat IssueReadModel JSON + new get_pr section). Update end-issue.prompt.md (get_pr before merge_pr, mismatch guard, base_branch). Update start-issue.prompt.md (JSON field references).
cycles.name: C3: Docs and prompt updates
